lookup.details: Artifact located with size_in_bytes=352094 and expired=false.

misclassification_observed.current_workflow_message: Artifact lookup failed: artifact=INFRA-predictions-rolling workflow=cbb_predictions_rolling.yml branch=main max_runs=100
misclassification_observed.assessment: Lookup succeeded; failure occurs in download stage and is currently mislabeled as LOOKUP_FAILED.

root_cause_statement: The downloader sends Accept: application/octet-stream when requesting the artifact archive URL. GitHub now requires JSON Accept on this API endpoint; the request fails with HTTP 415 before redirect/archive retrieval.
